stories.title: Mercedes Canada Upgrade — 0.3s Per Lap Package Breakdown
stories.angle: The specific technical components — what each one does and why Canada in particular is the target for this upgrade.

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Mercedes is bringing their BIGGEST upgrade of the 2026 season to Canada.

0.3s per lap. New floor. Lighter gearbox. New start software.

Antonelli leads by 20 pts. This package could make it 40 by next Sunday. 👀 #F1 #CanadaGP

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Mercedes only brought 2 updates to Miami — they were saving the good stuff for Canada.

0.3s/lap upgrade. New gearbox. Better race starts for Antonelli (his weakness all season).

Montreal is going to be a statement. #F1 #CanadaGP #Mercedes

article.headline: Mercedes' 0.3-Second Canada Upgrade Explained — What Each Component Does and Why It Matters

stories.title: Canada GP Full Sprint Weekend Guide — Session Times, What to Watch
stories.angle: Complete session-by-session guide to the sprint weekend format, including championship stakes at each stage.

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
FOUR DAYS until the Canadian GP 🏁

The first-ever sprint race at Circuit Gilles-Villeneuve.

Friday: Sprint Qualifying
Saturday: Sprint Race + GP Qualifying
Sunday: The Grand Prix

70 laps. St. Lawrence River. One of the best weekends in F1. #CanadaGP #F1

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Canada GP start times (ET):

🏎 Fri May 22 — Sprint Qualifying: 9:30 PM
🏁 Sat May 23 — Sprint Race: 5:00 PM
⏱ Sat May 23 — Qualifying: 9:00 PM
🏆 Sun May 24 — RACE: ~2:00 PM

Antonelli leads. Mercedes upgrading. It's on. #CanadaGP #F1

stories.title: McLaren at Montreal — Norris, Piastri and the Dark Horse Title Threat
stories.angle: How McLaren's internal championship dynamic (Norris 51 pts, Piastri 43 pts) interacts with their strategy at Montreal, and what a 1-2 finish would mean for the overall standings.

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Norris (51 pts) and Piastri (43 pts) both want to be McLaren No. 1 this season.

Canada was a strong McLaren circuit in 2025. Mercedes is bringing a huge upgrade.

The team orders conversation at McLaren is coming. #F1 #CanadaGP #McLaren

article.headline: McLaren's Quiet Threat at Canada — Why Norris and Piastri Are the Wild Card at Gilles-Villeneuve

stories.title: Red Bull's Structural Crisis — RB22 Overweight, Fix May Wait Until 2027
stories.angle: Why Red Bull's Canada hopes are limited, what Verstappen needs, and the exit clause countdown.

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Red Bull's RB22 might be overweight until 2027.

Verstappen (26 pts, 7th) calls it "incredibly tough to drive." Red Bull 6th in constructors.

Exit clause triggers at Hungarian GP in July. Time is running out. #F1 #RedBull #Verstappen

stories.title: Championship Knife Fight — Can Anyone Catch Antonelli Before Summer Break?
stories.angle: The devil's advocate case against Antonelli: Russell's Canada history (won 2025), McLaren's closing pace, Ferrari's constructors investment.

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Antonelli leads 100-80-59-51 after 4 races.

Sounds comfortable. But Russell won Canada last year. McLaren found pace. Ferrari has upgrades.

Canada (May 22-24) is 34 points up for grabs between sprint and race.

The 2026 title is far from over. #F1 #CanadaGP

article.headline: Can Anyone Catch Antonelli Before Summer? The 2026 Championship Math Examined
